A Philippine village dog population commonly known as Aspin, with varied appearance, size, and ancestry.
Varied by individual; often adaptable, resilient, alert, and loyal when socialized and cared for.
Care needs vary by individual; regular veterinary care, vaccination, parasite prevention, exercise, and socialization are important.
Training needs vary by individual; consistent reward-based training and socialization are recommended.

record_note: Trait scores were intentionally left blank because Aspin is a naturally occurring landrace rather than a standardized breed. Individual dogs can vary considerably.
